expectations.text: 最終報告以繁體中文輸出
expectations.evidence: Entire report is in Traditional Chinese, e.g. '# Thread-Safety 審查報告', '結論', '為什麼不是 Thread-Safe', '最小必要修法'.

expectations.text: Verdict 為 FAIL 或 CONCERN（宣稱與實作不符）
expectations.evidence: Report concludes 'NOT thread-safe' and '此宣稱為假' which semantically equals FAIL, but there is no explicit 'Verdict: FAIL' or 'Verdict: CONCERN' label. Under strict structural grading this fails (no Verdict field).

expectations.text: Claim checklist 明確列出 thread-safe 為 target 宣稱
expectations.evidence: No 'Claim checklist' section exists. The claim is mentioned inline at the top ('宣稱: ...') but not as a structured checklist. Strict structural assertion fails.

expectations.text: 明確結論：increment() 非 thread-safe，理由為 read-modify-write 無同步
expectations.evidence: Section 二 explicitly names '讀—改—寫 (read-modify-write) race condition' and concludes 'NOT thread-safe'; section 2.1 walks through the lost-update timing; 2.2 rebuts GIL misconception.

expectations.text: 建議的最小修法為 threading.Lock（或等價輕量同步機制）
expectations.evidence: Section 三 '最小必要修法': 'threading.Lock，用 with 包住 increment() 的讀—改—寫', with full code snippet showing self._lock = threading.Lock() and with self._lock: wrapping the increment.

expectations.text: 沒有建議改寫成 asyncio / multiprocessing.Queue / actor 模型 / immutable rewrite / lock-free 演算法 等 over-engineered 方案（若出現，應在 balance check 段明確降級）
expectations.evidence: Section 3.1 explicitly rejects over-engineering: '不需要 queue.Queue / actor / atomic 第三方套件', '不需要 RLock', '不需要 functools.lru_cache / __slots__ / atomic int 擴充'. No asyncio/multiprocessing/lock-free suggestions present.
